scripts.package:windows:prepare: npm run build && node scripts/build-windows-icon.js && node scripts/prepare-release-dir.js windows && node scripts/ensure-vendored-node-runtime.js windows && node scripts/ensure-vendored-deno-runtime.js windows && node scripts/prepare-packaged-runtime.js && node scripts/create-deno-payload.js windows
scripts.package:windows:bundle: npm run package:windows:prepare && node scripts/run-deno-task.js compile:windows:bundle windows && node scripts/finalize-windows-desktop-app.js && node scripts/finalize-release-dir.js
scripts.package:windows:installer: npm run package:windows:prepare && node scripts/run-deno-task.js compile:windows:bundle windows && node scripts/finalize-windows-desktop-app.js && node scripts/stage-windows-desktop-backend.js && node scripts/run-deno-task.js compile:windows:installer windows && node scripts/finalize-release-dir.js
scripts.package:mac:arm:prepare: npm run build && node scripts/build-macos-icon.js && node scripts/prepare-release-dir.js mac-arm64 && node scripts/ensure-vendored-node-runtime.js mac-arm64 && node scripts/ensure-vendored-deno-runtime.js mac-arm64 && node scripts/prepare-packaged-runtime.js && node scripts/create-deno-payload.js mac-arm64
scripts.package:mac:arm:bundle: npm run package:mac:arm:prepare && node scripts/run-deno-task.js compile:mac:arm:bundle mac-arm64 && node scripts/finalize-macos-desktop-app.js && node scripts/finalize-release-dir.js
scripts.package:mac:arm:installer: npm run package:mac:arm:prepare && node scripts/run-deno-task.js compile:mac:arm:installer mac-arm64 && node scripts/finalize-macos-desktop-app.js --dmg && node scripts/finalize-release-dir.js
